seoTitle: Forrest vs Forrest Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Forrest and Forrest Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Forrest vs Forrest Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Forrest and Forrest Beach.
heading: Forrest vs Forrest Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Forrest, Western Australia and Forrest Beach, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Forrest has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Forrest Beach (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Forrest or Forrest Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Forrest has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Forrest Beach scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Forrest scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Forrest Beach scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Forrest or Forrest Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Forrest has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
